name: M4A1消音版 | 女火神之炽焰
nameZh: M4A1消音版 | 女火神之炽焰
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been hand painted in vibrant colors and accentuated by a smiley face on the stock. Protect what is yours
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这件武器手工涂装，色彩艳丽，枪托有笑脸装饰。 保护好属于你的
